    • magclass 6

is.temporal, is.spatial

Source: R/is.temporal.R
is.temporal.Rd

Functions to find out whether a vector consists of strings consistent with the definition for auto-detection of temporal or spatial data.

Usage

is.temporal(x)

Arguments

x

A vector

Value

Returns TRUE or FALSE

See also

Other ObjectInfo: dimExists(), fulldim(), hasCoords(), hasSets(), isYear(), ncells(), ndim(), sameDims()

Author

Jan Philipp Dietrich

Examples


is.temporal(1991:1993)
#> [1] TRUE
is.spatial(c("GLO", "AFR"))
#> [1] TRUE

On this page

Developed by Jan Philipp Dietrich, Benjamin Leon Bodirsky, Markus Bonsch, Florian Humpenoeder, Stephen Bi, Kristine Karstens, Debbora Leip, Pascal Sauer, Patrick Rein.
